_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Prepare use cases to justify the need for specific information technology (IT) solutions.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in evaluating AI use case feasibility, including data availability assessment, technical complexity estimation, and business value quantification.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI AI domain. AI-S-018 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-S-002 (DA, cosine: 0.519), TF-A-003 (TF, cosine: 0.482).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.545). Shared vocabulary: [use]. DCWF-only terms [cases, information, justify, need, prepare, solutions] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, assessment, availability, business, case, complexity] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.869 (P=0.879, R=0.860). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DCWF element and 18-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Prepare use cases to justify the need for specific information technology (IT) s" and "Skill in evaluating AI use case feasibility, including data availability assessm" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.584 ≈ STS 0.545 (gap 0.039). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [use] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.3%. Shared tokens: [use]. DCWF-only: [cases, information, justify, need, prepare, solutions]. WIDAI-only: [ai, assessment, availability, business, case, complexity].
